data.title: Abacus Global Management Posts Strong Q4 Results, Issues Outlook
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Abacus Global Management ( (ABX) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 12, 2026, Abacus Global Management reported that fourth quarter 2025 revenue rose 116% year over year to $71.9 million and full year 2025 revenue more than doubled to $235.2 million, driven largely by surging Life Solutions and Asset Management income. The company swung from a prior-year GAAP net loss to 2025 net income of $36.5 million, lifted adjusted net income 84% to $85.7 million and expanded adjusted EBITDA 115% to $132.6 million, while deploying $580.8 million of origination capital and growing policy originations 26%.

Management highlighted 11 consecutive quarters of earnings outperformance, ROE and ROIC above 20% and a fourth quarter adjusted EBITDA margin of 54%, underscoring the scalability of its alternative asset platform. Abacus also initiated a full-year 2026 adjusted net income outlook of $96 million to $104 million, approved its first annual dividend and a $20 million share repurchase program, moved its listing to the NYSE, completed the AccuQuote acquisition and announced a $52.9 million minority investment in Manning & Napier, collectively strengthening shareholder returns, broadening wealth and protection capabilities and reinforcing its long-term ambition to become a mid-cap manager with roughly $450 million in adjusted EBITDA at scale.

The most recent analyst rating on (ABX) stock is a Buy with a $13.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Abacus Global Management stock, see the ABX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by a positive earnings narrative (raised guidance, strong adjusted profitability growth, and shareholder-return actions) and a generally stable balance sheet. However, the overall rating is held back by weak reported profitability and cash-flow quality in the financial statements and an expensive valuation (high P/E), with technicals showing only mixed/neutral momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on ABX stock, click here.

More about Abacus Global Management

Abacus Global Management, Inc., listed on the NYSE under the ticker ABX, operates in the alternative asset management industry with a focus on life solutions, asset management and technology services. The company deploys capital into longevity-based assets, manages policy originations and related investment strategies, and is positioning itself as a mid-cap manager with a growing base of recurring revenue.

The firm’s offerings span integrated protection, wealth accumulation and preservation solutions across the client lifecycle, bolstered by strategic acquisitions such as AccuQuote and a minority stake in wealth advisory firm Manning & Napier. Abacus targets institutional visibility through its NYSE listing and uses its investor relations website as a primary channel for disseminating material information and financial results to the market.

Average Trading Volume: 565,915

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $987.3M

The latest update is out from Bassett Furniture ( (BSET) ).

Bassett Furniture held its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders on March 11, 2026, with 8,686,117 common shares eligible to vote, and shareholders elected all nominated directors, including Emma S. Battle, John R. Belk and other incumbents. Investors also ratified Grant Thornton LLP as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending November 28, 2026, approved on an advisory basis the compensation of certain executive officers, and authorized an amendment to the 2017 Employee Stock Purchase Plan increasing available shares by 200,000, signaling broad shareholder support for current governance, pay practices and capital incentives.

These votes suggest continuity in Bassett Furniture’s leadership and oversight, as the board slate advanced without opposition and the auditor ratification passed by a wide margin. The expansion of the employee stock purchase plan indicates ongoing use of equity-based incentives to attract and retain talent, aligning employees more closely with shareholder interests and potentially affecting future share dilution and compensation structures.

On March 12, 2026, JLL’s global leadership team used an investor briefing in New York to unveil its Accelerate 2030 multi-year strategy, positioning the company to build on its decade of growth, diversified service portfolio and technology-driven advantages in data and AI. On March 12, 2026, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories allotted 10,275 fully paid equity shares of Re.1 each to eligible employees following the exercise of stock options under its 2002 Employee Stock Options Scheme and 2007 ADR Stock Option Scheme. data.title: Turkcell Raises TRY 500 Million via High-Yield Domestic Bond Issuance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Turkcell Iletisim ( (TKC) ) is now available.

On March 12, 2026, Turkcell completed the book-building for a TRY 500 million financing bond issued under its previously approved TRY 10 billion domestic debt programme. The bond, sold via private placement to qualified investors in Türkiye with no public offering, carries a fixed annual simple interest rate of 40.25% and a maturity date of June 24, 2026, with settlement to investor accounts taking place on March 12, 2026.

The short-term bill, which will trade on the exchange and is serviced in Turkish lira through a single coupon payment at maturity, has a 104-day tenor starting March 12, 2026. The issuance is backed by Turkcell’s long-term national AAA (tr) investment-grade rating from JCR Avrasya as of May 29, 2025, reinforcing investor confidence in the company’s credit profile and providing additional local-currency funding flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (TKC) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Turkcell Iletisim stock, see the TKC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TKC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TKC is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying financial performance (notably cash flow) and a constructive earnings outlook with clear growth initiatives, partially offset by weaker technical momentum and risks around margin pressure and FX exposure. Valuation (low P/E and solid yield) provides additional support.

To see Spark’s full report on TKC stock, click here.

More about Turkcell Iletisim

Turkcell İletişim Hizmetleri A.Ş. is a leading Turkish telecommunications operator providing mobile, fixed-line, and digital services to consumers and enterprises. The company focuses on the domestic Turkish market, offering connectivity, data, and related value-added services, and is an active issuer in local capital markets to support its financing needs.

data.title: Bluejay Advances Symphony IL-6 Sepsis Diagnostic Program
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bluejay Diagnostics ( (BJDX) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Bluejay Diagnostics announced that an abstract on its Symphony IL-6 Test was accepted for presentation at the 2026 Society of Academic Emergency Medicine Annual Meeting, to be held May 18–21 in Atlanta. The work will share data from SYMON-I, a multicenter pilot study examining how IL-6 levels in emergency department sepsis patients correlate with organ dysfunction measured by SOFA scores over the first three days of hospitalization.

Investigators reported that SYMON-I findings suggest emergency department IL-6 levels may be associated with subsequent organ dysfunction in sepsis and septic shock, adding to evidence that IL-6 could serve as an early biomarker in critically ill patients. Bluejay highlighted that SYMON-II, its pivotal validation study, is underway and is intended to underpin a future 510(k) submission, signaling progress toward potential FDA clearance and reinforcing the strategic importance of Symphony IL-6 within sepsis diagnostics.

The most recent analyst rating on (BJDX) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluejay Diagnostics stock, see the BJDX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BJDX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BJDX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal revenue, ongoing losses, and sustained cash burn) and a bearish technical setup below key moving averages. Positive corporate developments in clinical progress and manufacturing readiness provide some offset, but they do not yet translate into proven revenue traction or profitability.

To see Spark’s full report on BJDX stock, click here.

More about Bluejay Diagnostics

Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. is a medical diagnostics company focused on rapid near‑patient testing for critical care conditions, centered on its Symphony System for sepsis triage and monitoring. Its lead product candidate, the Symphony IL-6 Test, is designed to deliver IL-6 biomarker results in about 20 minutes to support earlier, more informed treatment decisions, but the system has not yet received U.S. regulatory clearance.

The company’s market focus is on emergency and intensive care settings where faster sepsis risk stratification and monitoring could improve outcomes and resource utilization. Bluejay aims to use data from its SYMON clinical study program to support regulatory submissions and position Symphony as a cost-effective tool in managing critically ill patients.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.97M

data.title: Immersion Faces Ongoing Filing Delays and Meeting Postponement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Immersion ( (IMMR) ) is now available.

Immersion Corporation reported on March 12, 2026, that it has filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended April 30, 2025, after audit committee investigations at both the company and its consolidated variable interest entity Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. led to a restatement of prior financial information and significant delays. The investigations and restatement prevented management from completing financial statements for the quarters ended July 31, 2025 and October 31, 2025, as well as the 2025 fiscal year on a normal timetable, leaving related quarterly and annual reports overdue as the company works to regain SEC and Nasdaq compliance by filing them as soon as practicable.

Also on March 12, 2026, the board postponed Immersion’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, originally tied to the now-delayed 2025 Form 10-K, rescheduling it to April 6, 2026, with details on the meeting location to be provided in a forthcoming definitive proxy statement. The combination of delayed regulatory filings and the rescheduled shareholder meeting highlights ongoing governance and reporting challenges stemming from the restatement process, with timing of full compliance and potential impacts on investor confidence remaining key points of attention for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IMMR) stock is a Hold with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Immersion stock, see the IMMR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IMMR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IMMR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by elevated corporate compliance/restatement risk and weaker cash-flow quality alongside higher leverage. These are partly offset by very attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield) and mostly neutral technicals.

To see Spark’s full report on IMMR stock, click here.

More about Immersion

Immersion Corporation operates in the technology sector, focusing on solutions that involve complex financial reporting and consolidation of variable interest entities such as Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. The company is listed on Nasdaq and is subject to U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission reporting and listing compliance requirements, underscoring its reliance on timely and accurate financial disclosures.

data.title: Petrobras Highlights R$277.6 Billion Tax and Royalty Contribution in Brazil for 2025
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has issued an announcement.

Petrobras reported that in 2025 it paid R$277.6 billion in taxes and government take in Brazil, a 3% increase over the prior year, alongside US$448.65 million in taxes abroad and the approval of R$47.5 billion in dividends, of which R$45.2 billion were disbursed. The company said these payments, equivalent to about R$1.1 billion per business day and roughly 7% of Brazil’s total revenue, underscore its status as one of the country’s largest taxpayers and a key source of funding for federal, state and municipal budgets, reinforcing its economic and social relevance as it pursues its strategy as an integrated, diversified energy player.

In 2025 Petrobras’ contributions included R$68.6 billion in royalties and other government take, R$93.3 billion in federal taxes and R$113.8 billion in state taxes, reflecting its heavy exposure to Brazil’s complex multi-level tax system and its role as both taxpayer and tax withholding agent. Management highlighted that robust tax governance, supported by ethics and transparency principles, is central to the company’s risk management and to its ability to sustain large-scale public transfers and shareholder returns, positioning Petrobras as a pivotal intermediary between the oil sector’s wealth generation and public spending in areas such as health, education, infrastructure and security.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBR) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras stock, see the PBR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PBR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong margins and cash generation, though cyclical and less robust than peak years) and strong technical trend signals despite overbought momentum risk. Valuation is a major positive with a very low P/E and high dividend yield, while the earnings call supports the outlook via operational execution but flags key risks from oil-price exposure (no hedging) and elevated debt/leasing obligations.

To see Spark’s full report on PBR stock, click here.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is Brazil’s state-controlled integrated energy company, operating across exploration and production, refining, distribution and related petroleum and gas activities. With 477 branches in 22 states and 128 municipalities, it is among the main taxpayers in Brazil, playing a central role in the national oil, gas and fuel markets and in public revenue generation.

data.title: Pulse Biosciences Launches Thyroid Cancer Feasibility Study
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pulse Biosciences ( (PLSE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Pulse Biosciences announced that the first patients were enrolled in a multicenter, first-in-human feasibility study evaluating its nPulse Vybrance Percutaneous Electrode System for treating T1N0M0 papillary thyroid microcarcinoma, a small, slow-growing form of thyroid cancer. Initial procedures were successfully completed at Sarasota Memorial Health Care System in Florida and The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center in Texas, with a total of 30 patients planned across the two sites.

The study, conducted under an Investigational Device Exemption, will assess the safety and effectiveness of the Vybrance System in tumors under 1.5 cm, leveraging nsPFA energy to provide precise, nonthermal ablation while preserving critical surrounding structures. The device, already cleared by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for soft tissue ablation, is partly funded by Pulse Biosciences for this thyroid cancer application, marking an operational step that could broaden its clinical footprint in minimally invasive oncology treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLSE) stock is a Hold with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pulse Biosciences stock, see the PLSE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PLSE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PLSE is a Neutral.

PLSE scores below average primarily due to weak financial performance (minimal revenue, large losses, and elevated cash burn) and limited valuation support (negative P/E, no dividend). Offsetting these are improving longer-term technical positioning (above 50/100/200-day averages) and constructive earnings-call updates around IDE progress, clinical outcomes, and IP expansion, though near-term commercialization and funding needs remain key constraints.

To see Spark’s full report on PLSE stock, click here.

More about Pulse Biosciences

Pulse Biosciences, Inc. is a bioelectric medicine company that develops its proprietary nPulse technology, which delivers nanosecond pulsed field ablation (nsPFA) energy to non-thermally clear cellular tissue while sparing adjacent noncellular structures. The company targets applications including atrial fibrillation and surgical soft tissue ablation, as well as non-cardiac indications through systems like its nPulse Vybrance Percutaneous Electrode System.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. ( (JFBR) ) has provided an announcement.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, through its homeland security subsidiary KeepZone AI, is positioning itself as a provider of AI-enabled security ecosystems for government, defense and critical infrastructure clients worldwide. Separately, on March 12, 2026, Jeffs’ Brands convened a special general meeting of shareholders that was adjourned by one day due to lack of quorum. data.description:

The latest update is out from Ondas ( (ONDS) ).

On March 12, 2026, Palantir Technologies, Ondas and World View Enterprises announced a strategic partnership to develop an AI-enabled, multi-domain intelligence platform integrating stratospheric balloons, autonomous aerial and ground robots and advanced software. The alliance targets defense, homeland security and critical infrastructure customers with persistent intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance capabilities spanning the stratosphere, air and land.

The partners will fuse World View’s Stratollite high-altitude platforms with Ondas’ unmanned and counter-drone systems, all coordinated by Palantir’s Artificial Intelligence Platform to unify mission planning, production and edge operations. Three core programs—Warp Speed, AI Flight Director and SkyWeaver—are designed to streamline aerospace production, enhance flight operations and push data processing to the edge, positioning Ondas and its partners to scale complex ISR missions and shift the focus from raw data collection to faster, decision-centric intelligence delivery.

data.title: Ultragenyx Announces Positive Phase 3 Results for DTX301
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical ( (RARE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Ultragenyx reported positive Phase 3 Enh3ance trial results for DTX301, its investigational AAV8 gene therapy for ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency, showing an 18% reduction in 24-hour plasma ammonia levels versus placebo at Week 36 and maintenance of average ammonia exposure within the normal range. Patients on DTX301 rapidly improved ammonia control despite reduced use of ammonia scavenger medications and higher protein intake, reported better symptom and daily living scores than placebo, and experienced fewer hyperammonemic crises and deaths, while safety remained consistent with earlier studies and the program is being advanced within existing spending plans and a goal of profitability in 2027.

The study’s planned second primary endpoint will assess reduction in treatment burden, including medication and dietary restrictions, across treated and placebo-crossover groups through 64 weeks, with data expected in the first half of 2027, potentially positioning DTX301 as a meaningful new option in OTC deficiency care. The company indicated that the conduct of this late-stage program aligns with its February 2026 financial guidance and is being managed to support its target of reaching profitability in 2027, underscoring both clinical and operational progress for stakeholders.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Verano Holdings ( (TSE:VRNO) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Verano reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $207 million, up 2% sequentially but down 5% year-on-year, with gross margin at 51% and adjusted EBITDA of $56 million, while posting a net loss of $183 million due largely to lower impairment charges versus 2024. For full-year 2025, revenue fell 6% to $822 million and net loss narrowed to $258 million, as the company streamlined operations, cut SG&A, and maintained a 28% adjusted EBITDA margin despite softer top-line performance.

Management highlighted achieving top-three market share across all categories, redomiciling from Canada to Nevada to position for potential U.S. capital markets access, settling legacy litigation, and winning a conditional vertical license in Texas ahead of a planned medical expansion. Verano also closed a new $195 million senior secured term loan at an initial 9.5% rate that it characterizes as among the industry’s most favorable, bolstering liquidity and funding measured capex of $41 million in 2025 and a guided $30–50 million range for 2026 aimed at efficiency upgrades and selective retail growth.

The company generated $53 million in operating cash flow in 2025, down from $112 million in 2024, reflecting inventory adjustments and higher tax payments, but continued to invest in automation, CPG technology, and marketing to support brand strength amid price compression and intensified competition. With existing or pending operations in Florida, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Texas, Verano argues it is well-positioned to benefit from potential U.S. federal rescheduling of cannabis and state-level medical program expansion in what it expects could be a pivotal 2026 for the sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VRNO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Verano Holdings stock, see the TSE:VRNO Stock Forecast page.

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings ( (AVAH) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 9, 2026, Aveanna subsidiary Pediatric Services of America, LLC agreed to acquire all membership interests of Family First Holding, LLC, a multi-state pediatric home care provider operating as Family First Homecare, for $175.5 million in cash, subject to customary adjustments. Aveanna plans to fund the deal with cash on hand and borrowings under its existing short-term credit facility, and expects the transaction to close in the second fiscal quarter of 2026, pending regulatory clearance and other standard closing conditions.

Family First Homecare, founded in 2012, delivers skilled Private Duty Nursing through 27 locations across seven states, and its acquisition will expand Aveanna’s pediatric home care footprint and reinforce its specialized care model for medically fragile children. Executives from both companies highlighted strong cultural alignment and a shared focus on high-quality, patient-centered care, suggesting the deal could strengthen Aveanna’s competitive position and create added value for patients, payers, and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVAH) stock is a Hold with a $8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aveanna Healthcare Holdings stock, see the AVAH Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on AVAH stock, click here.

More about Aveanna Healthcare Holdings

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc., based in Atlanta, is a diversified home care provider focused on medically complex, high-cost pediatric and adult patient populations across 38 U.S. states. Its services span skilled nursing, rehabilitation and therapy, school-based nursing, day treatment centers, home health and hospice, enteral nutrition delivery, case management, and respite care, positioning the company as a lower-cost alternative to prolonged hospitalization.

The company coordinates care among payers, physicians, hospitals, and other providers to support families and improve outcomes while managing costs. Aveanna’s broad geographic footprint and comprehensive home- and community-based services underpin its strategy to deliver high-quality, patient-centered care at scale.
